message:
chore(conformance): refresh matrix snapshot — sscanf strict pass rate 100%

Regenerates conformance_matrix.v1.json after f56b18c3 (%n count fix +
harness scaffolding cleanup) on top of 54df9ea1/8dbd2164.

Aggregate
  passed         1395 -> 1403  (+8)
  errors           18 -> 10    (-8)
  pass_rate    98.72% -> 99.29%

sscanf strict
  passed         98/106 -> 106/106
  errors             8 -> 0
  pass_rate    92.45% -> 100.00%

The eight previously-erroring sscanf strict rows now pass because the
%n count contract matches POSIX and the multi-arg + length-modifier
dispatch lands their cases through the matrix path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
